summary: Full E2E testing of /support page + public POST APIs + admin Support/Partners LeadsManager. Backend: all 9 endpoints (POST ticket/partner, Zod 400, unauth 401, login, list, PATCH status, DELETE) pass with proper status codes and data persistence. Frontend: 19/19 support page checks pass (8 sections, 12 categories, 12 FAQ, 7 checklist, hero search live-filter incl. empty state for gibberish, accordion toggle visually confirmed, category->#faq anchor nav). Both forms submit and transition to success state. FR↔EN locale switch fully updates all labels (verified Hero, nav, categories, search placeholder). Admin: login, sidebar nav (Support+Partners testids), tickets+partners list/detail/status PATCH all work; partner created via UI smoke ('TEST UI Acme') appears in admin with all fields correctly persisted and 'REVIEWING' status PATCH confirmed visually. Regression smoke: /, /about-us, /services, /advertising, /blog, /news, /careers all 200; sitemap.xml includes /support; unauth admin endpoints return 401.
critical_code_review_comments: Public POST /api/support/ticket and /api/support/partner correctly validate via Zod (400 on empty body) and persist to Postgres; SMTP unconfigured so notify() silently returns false but does not break the save flow — confirmed in code and via curl.
Admin sidebar testids follow the documented 'admin-nav-{label-lowercased}' pattern (admin-nav-support, admin-nav-partners). Confirmed in AdminShell.tsx line 53 and visually rendered.
LeadsManager testids ({kind}-leads-manager, {kind}-row-{id}, {kind}-detail-{id}, {kind}-status-{statusKey}) work correctly for both ticket and partner kinds.

FAQ accordion single-open behavior: visually confirmed via screenshot (only Q2 'Comment créer un compte ?' expanded showing answer). DOM height check via offsetHeight returned -1 because the panel uses framer-motion AnimatePresence and the panel element is conditionally mounted (so [data-testid=support-faq-panel-N] is absent when collapsed) — this is correct behaviour and not a bug. Test logic just needs to assert presence (count) rather than read offsetHeight.

Locale switch behavior: full UI updates. Hero title in EN reads 'Welcome to the bakēd support center', nav becomes 'SUPPORT CENTER', search placeholder 'How can we help you?', flag switches to UK. All sections re-render with i18n strings.
No console errors observed during entire support page test run.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all acceptance criteria — 3 false-negative test logic issues self-resolved on visual inspection

verified_passing: GET /support → 200 in FR (default)
Locale switch FR→EN fully translates page (verified Hero, nav, search placeholder, Categories heading 'Browse by topic')

data-testid='support-page' + all 8 section testids (support-hero, support-hero-title, support-search, support-categories, support-faq, support-required-info, support-form-section, partner-form-section, support-commitment, support-download) present
12 support-cat-0..11 cards present
12 support-faq-item-0..11 present
7 support-checklist-0..6 present
Hero search 'paiement' (FR) → live filter to 1 FAQ item; clear restores all 12; 'xyzzy123' shows support-faq-empty and 0 items
Category card click → #faq hash navigation works (URL hash = '#faq' after support-cat-3 click)
FAQ accordion toggle expands/collapses (visually confirmed Q2 expanded with answer 'Ouvrez l'application, choisissez Créer un compte...')
Customer Support form happy path → POST 200 → success state support-form-success appears
Partner Application form happy path → POST 200 → success state partner-form-success appears
Header nav 'Assistance & Support' (FR) / 'Support Center' (EN) link visible and styled gold/active on /support
POST /api/support/ticket valid payload → 200; empty body → 400 (Zod)
POST /api/support/partner valid payload → 200
Unauthenticated GET /api/admin/support/tickets → 401
Unauthenticated GET /api/admin/support/partners → 401
POST /api/auth/login (admin@baked.group / BakedAdmin2025!) → 200, cookie set
Authenticated GET /api/admin/support/tickets → 200 returns ticket array incl. 'Test User' and 'TEST Backend' entries
Authenticated GET /api/admin/support/partners → 200 returns partner array incl. 'Acme Resto' and 'TEST Acme' entries
PATCH /api/admin/support/tickets/:id {status:'in_progress'} → 200, status updated in returned object
PATCH /api/admin/support/partners/:id {status:'reviewing'} → 200, status updated
DELETE /api/admin/support/tickets/:id → 200
DELETE /api/admin/support/partners/:id → 200
Admin login UI works; sidebar shows Support (LifeBuoy) and Partners (Handshake) nav items
/admin/support/tickets → ticket-leads-manager renders, 2 ticket-row-* rows present, clicking row shows ticket-detail-{id}, ticket-status-in_progress click PATCHes successfully (no console errors)

/admin/support/partners → partner-leads-manager renders, 2 partner-row-* rows present, partner-detail-{id} shows full data, partner-status-reviewing PATCH confirmed by visual highlight on REVIEWING pill in screenshot
Regression: /, /about-us, /services, /advertising, /blog, /news, /careers all return 200
sitemap.xml contains <loc>https://baked.group/support</loc>
seed_data_creation: Created via UI test: 1 support ticket (TEST UI User, deleted via subsequent test) and 1 partner application (TEST UI Acme, currently in DB with status=reviewing). Also created via curl: 'TEST Backend' ticket (deleted) and 'TEST Acme' partner (deleted). Main agent's seed entries 'Test User' ticket and 'Acme Resto' partner still present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Support Center features (public page, public POST APIs, admin LeadsManager for both tickets and partners) are fully working end-to-end. SMTP is intentionally unconfigured in .env so email notify() returns false silently — saves still succeed. Postgres has 1 leftover TEST UI Acme partner entry with status=reviewing; can be cleaned via DELETE if needed. No bugs found, no action items for E1.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. The 3 'FAILED' assertions in the playwright run were false negatives: (a) 'Admin login success' check used wait_for_url('**/admin**') which matched the login URL itself; (b) admin-nav-support/partners count=0 was captured before login redirect fully completed — visual screenshot afterwards confirms both testids render correctly in the sidebar; (c) locale-switch assertion used over-strict string matching ('Support'/'Help'/'How') but actual EN title is 'Welcome to the bakēd support center' (lowercase 'support') — visual confirms full EN translation.
